name: 焓变与反应热
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 反应性 1 · 热力学 Reactivity 1 · What Drives Chemical Reactions
curriculum_points: Define and apply the terms standard enthalpy change of reaction (ΔH°), formation (ΔH_f°), combustion (ΔH_c°), and neutralization (AO1).
Calculate the heat energy change (q) for a reaction using the expression q = mcΔT, and apply calorimetry data to determine the enthalpy change per mole for a reaction (AO2, AO3).
